argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const limit = {{ limit }} || 10; const username = "{{ username }}"; const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href*="/video/"]')); const seen = {}; const results = []; for (const a of links) { const href = a.href; if (seen[href]) continue; seen[href] = true; results.push({ index: results.length + 1, views: a.textContent.trim() || '-', url: href }); if (results.length >= limit) break; } if (results.length === 0) return [{ index: 0, views: 'No videos found', url: '' }]; return results; }

description: Get recent videos from a TikTok user
name: User
